title: The electromechanical angle computer inside the B-52 bomber's star tracker
summary:
The B-52 bomber's Astro Compass system, developed before GPS, enabled automated celestial navigation. Its core component was an electromechanical Angle Computer, which solved the complex spherical trigonometry required to convert a star's fixed celestial coordinates (declination and sidereal hour angle) into local azimuth and altitude for the aircraft.

The system worked by physically modeling the celestial sphere. Inside the computer, a mechanical star pointer was positioned on a small hemisphere based on the star's coordinates and the aircraft's latitude. As the mechanism rotated to account for the Earth's spin (local hour angle), it mechanically translated the star's position into the necessary azimuth and altitude outputs, which were read electrically by synchros.

Navigators input star data—obtained from published Air Almanacs—via a master control panel. The overall Astro Compass included a star-tracking telescope mounted in a dome on the aircraft's fuselage, stabilized by a gyroscope, along with multiple control and display units in the cockpit. This electromechanical system provided a highly accurate, jam-proof heading independent of ground-based signals, showcasing an ingenious analog solution to a complex real-time navigation problem.
chinese_title: B-52轰炸机星象跟踪仪内的机电角度计算机
chinese_summary:
B-52轰炸机的天文罗盘系统，在GPS问世前便实现了自动化天体导航。其核心部件是一台机电角度计算机，能够解决复杂的球面三角计算，将恒星的固定天体坐标（赤纬和恒星时角）转换为飞机所需的本地方位角与高度角。

该系统通过实体模拟天球运作。计算机内部，一个机械星标指针会根据恒星坐标与飞机纬度，定位在小型半球模型上。随着机构旋转以补偿地球自转（本地时角），机械装置将恒星位置转换为所需的方位角与高度角输出，并通过同步器进行电信号读取。

领航员通过主控制面板输入从《航空年历》中获取的恒星数据。整套天文罗盘系统包含安装在机身穹顶内、由陀螺仪稳定的恒星追踪望远镜，以及驾驶舱内的多个控制与显示单元。这套机电系统能提供高精度、抗干扰的航向指引，无需依赖地面信号，以精妙的模拟技术解决了复杂的实时导航难题。

title: Migrating from DigitalOcean to Hetzner
summary:
This article details a production server migration from DigitalOcean to Hetzner, reducing monthly costs from $1,432 to $233 while achieving zero downtime. The primary motivation was financial, driven by high dollar-denominated costs in Turkey. The new Hetzner AX162-R dedicated server offered superior specs (48-core CPU, 256GB RAM, NVMe storage) for a fraction of the price.

The migration involved a complex stack: 30 MySQL databases (248GB), 34 Nginx sites, GitLab EE, and Neo4j, serving live mobile app traffic. The strategy used master-slave MySQL replication with **mydumper/myloader** for fast parallel data transfer, keeping both servers in sync until cutover. Key steps included cloning web files, lowering DNS TTLs, and converting the old Nginx server into a reverse proxy to handle traffic during DNS propagation.

A significant challenge was upgrading from MySQL 5.7 to 8.0, which required fixing schema issues. The team also discovered that the `SUPER` privilege bypasses MySQL's `read_only` setting, requiring privilege adjustments. All processes were scripted for reliability.

The result was a seamless transition with no user impact, saving over $14,000 annually and modernizing the OS from CentOS 7 to AlmaLinux 9. The key takeaway is that for steady-state workloads, dedicated servers can offer far better price-to-performance than cloud providers. All automation scripts used are available on GitHub.
chinese_title: 从DigitalOcean迁移到Hetzner
chinese_summary:
本文详细介绍了将生产服务器从DigitalOcean迁移至Hetzner的过程，在实现零停机的同时，将月度成本从1,432美元降至233美元。主要动机源于土耳其地区美元计价成本高昂的经济考量。新的Hetzner AX162-R专用服务器以极低价格提供了更优配置（48核CPU、256GB内存、NVMe存储）。

此次迁移涉及复杂的技术栈：30个MySQL数据库（248GB）、34个Nginx站点、GitLab EE和Neo4j，均需实时服务移动应用流量。迁移策略采用主从MySQL复制，配合**mydumper/myloader**实现快速并行数据传输，在切换前保持双服务器同步。关键步骤包括克隆网站文件、降低DNS TTL值，并将旧Nginx服务器转为反向代理以处理DNS传播期间的流量。

重大挑战之一是从MySQL 5.7升级至8.0，这需要修复架构兼容性问题。团队还发现`SUPER`权限会绕过MySQL的`read_only`设置，因此进行了权限调整。所有流程均通过脚本实现以确保可靠性。

最终实现了用户无感知的平滑过渡，每年节省超14,000美元，并将操作系统从CentOS 7升级至AlmaLinux 9。核心结论是：对于稳态工作负载，专用服务器能提供远超云服务商的性价比。所有自动化脚本已在GitHub开源。

title: State of Kdenlive
summary:
In 2025, the Kdenlive team focused on stability, performance, and UI polish across three major releases. Key features included an AI-powered background removal tool, a complete rewrite of OpenTimelineIO support for better project exchange, a redesigned audio mixer, a new docking system, and a welcome screen.

Looking ahead, the 26.04 release will add monitor mirroring and animated transition previews. Future roadmap highlights include 10/12-bit color support, a refactored keyframing system with a dopesheet, and improved subtitle tools. Work is also underway to enable distribution via the Microsoft Store.

The project saw strong community growth, with 38 code contributors in 2025, half of whom were first-timers. The team held productive sprints in Amsterdam and Berlin and participated in Akademy. Kdenlive was downloaded over 11.5 million times from its official page, with a global user base led by the United States, India, and Brazil.

Funding remains crucial. While €9,344 was raised in 2025, the team encourages more donations to allow maintainers to dedicate more time and potentially hire additional developers to accelerate progress.
chinese_title: Kdenlive 现状
chinese_summary:
2025年，Kdenlive团队通过三次重大版本更新聚焦于稳定性、性能优化和界面打磨。关键特性包括AI驱动的背景移除工具、为提升项目交换效率而彻底重写的OpenTimelineIO支持模块、重新设计的音频混音器、全新停靠系统以及欢迎界面。

展望未来，26.04版本将新增监视器镜像和动画转场预览功能。未来路线图重点包括10/12位色深支持、配备运动曲线编辑器重构的关键帧系统，以及增强的字幕工具。团队也正推进通过微软商店分发应用的工作。

项目社区呈现强劲增长态势，2025年共有38位代码贡献者，其中半数为首次参与者。团队在阿姆斯特丹和柏林举办了高效编程冲刺活动，并参与了Akademy大会。Kdenlive从官方页面下载量突破1150万次，全球用户分布前三名为美国、印度和巴西。

资金支持仍是关键。尽管2025年筹集了9344欧元，团队仍呼吁更多捐赠，以便维护者能投入更多时间，并有望雇佣额外开发人员加速项目进展。

title: Thoughts and feelings around Claude Design
summary:
The author argues that Figma's era as the "source of truth" for design is ending due to the rise of AI. They contend that Figma's complex, proprietary system of components and variables is a "pre-agentic" relic that is difficult for AI models to understand, as they were trained on code. As AI tools like Claude Design (which works directly with HTML/JS) and Claude Code make working in code easier for designers, the source of truth will naturally shift back to code, rendering Figma's intricate infrastructure obsolete.

The author illustrates this by critiquing the complexity of Figma's own design system files, which they see as a gold standard that is nonetheless a nightmare to debug. They predict design tooling will now fork into two paths: tools like Claude Design that are honest about being code-based and will integrate seamlessly with AI coding assistants, and pure, unconstrained visual exploration tools freed from the limitations of systemized design.

The core conclusion is that Figma is facing its "Sketch moment"—a disruptive shift—because it is locked into a manual, non-AI-native paradigm while the industry moves toward a unified, code-centric workflow powered by AI.
chinese_title: 关于Claude设计的思考与感受
chinese_summary:
作者认为，由于人工智能的兴起，Figma作为设计“唯一真相源”的时代正在终结。他们指出，Figma复杂且封闭的组件与变量系统属于“前智能体时代”的遗留产物，由于AI模型基于代码训练，很难理解这套体系。随着Claude Design（直接处理HTML/JS）和Claude Code等AI工具让设计师能更轻松地操作代码，真相源将自然回归代码本身，使Figma精密的架构逐渐过时。

作者以Figma自身设计系统文件的复杂性为例进行说明——尽管这些文件被视为行业标杆，但其调试过程如同噩梦。他们预测设计工具将分化为两条路径：一类如Claude Design般坦承基于代码开发，并与AI编程助手无缝集成；另一类则是纯粹、不受限制的可视化探索工具，摆脱系统化设计的束缚。

核心结论是：Figma正面临其“Sketch时刻”——一场颠覆性变革。当行业朝着AI驱动的、统一且以代码为中心的工作流迈进时，Figma却困于非AI原生的手动操作范式之中。

title: Show HN: MDV – a Markdown superset for docs, dashboards, and slides with data
summary:
MDV is a Markdown superset designed for creating data-rich documents, dashboards, and slides. It extends strict CommonMark with four key features: YAML front-matter for metadata and data references, fenced code blocks for charts and stats (e.g., ````chart type=bar````), `:::` containers for styled layouts, and an auto-generated table of contents.

The tool emphasizes simplicity, using only named styles and themes for formatting without requiring CSS selectors, classes, or custom code. It renders to self-contained HTML (with charts as inline SVG, no JavaScript) and PDF. A VS Code extension provides a live side-by-side preview.

The project is currently in a pre-release v1 state for Node.js 20+. It includes a CLI for rendering and previewing, comprehensive documentation, and a set of example files showcasing all features.
chinese_title: Show HN: MDV – 用于文档、仪表板和幻灯片的Markdown超集，支持数据集成
chinese_summary:
MDV是一种Markdown超集语言，专为创建数据密集型文档、仪表板和幻灯片而设计。它在严格的CommonMark基础上扩展了四项核心功能：用于元数据和数据引用的YAML前置信息、用于图表和统计的围栏代码块（例如````chart type=bar````）、用于样式化布局的`:::`容器，以及自动生成的目录。

该工具强调简洁性，仅通过命名样式和主题进行格式化，无需CSS选择器、类或自定义代码。它可渲染为自包含的HTML（图表以内联SVG形式呈现，无需JavaScript）和PDF格式。VS Code扩展插件提供实时并排预览功能。

该项目目前处于面向Node.js 20+的预发布v1阶段，包含用于渲染和预览的CLI工具、完整文档，以及一套展示所有功能的示例文件。

title: Young sons of U.S. marshal ride horseback from Oklahoma to New York (2018)
summary:
In 1910, brothers Louis "Bud" Abernathy, 10, and Temple, 6, embarked on a remarkable 2,000-mile horseback journey from Frederick, Oklahoma, to New York City. Their father, U.S. Marshal Jack "Catch 'em Alive" Abernathy—a friend of Theodore Roosevelt—approved the trip, setting rules for their safety, including a 50-mile daily limit and no Sunday travel.

Bud rode his father's horse, Sam Bass, while Temple rode a pony named Geronimo. They carried minimal supplies, used a lariat to ward off snakes at night, and relied on hospitality along the route. After Temple's pony fell ill in Oklahoma, they used an emergency fund to buy a new horse. Their adventure gained national attention, with newspapers reporting on their progress.

The boys' goal was to reach New York in time for the parade welcoming former President Roosevelt back from an African expedition. After two months of travel, they succeeded, joining their father and Roosevelt's Rough Riders in the celebratory parade down Fifth Avenue, witnessed by over a million people.
chinese_title: 美国法警的年轻儿子们骑马从俄克拉荷马州前往纽约（2018年）
chinese_summary:
1910年，10岁的路易斯·“巴德”·阿伯内西和6岁的坦普尔兄弟进行了一次非凡的旅程——他们骑马从俄克拉荷马州的弗雷德里克出发，穿越2000英里抵达纽约市。他们的父亲是美国法警杰克·“活捉能手”·阿伯内西（西奥多·罗斯福的朋友），他批准了这次旅行，并为安全制定了规则，包括每日不超过50英里且周日不赶路。

巴德骑着父亲的马萨姆·巴斯，坦普尔则骑着一匹名叫杰罗尼莫的小马。他们只带了极简的物资，夜晚用套索驱蛇，沿途依靠人们的善意接济。当坦普尔的小马在俄克拉荷马州生病后，他们动用应急资金买了新马。这场冒险引起了全国关注，报纸持续报道他们的行程。

兄弟俩的目标是及时赶到纽约，迎接前总统罗斯福从非洲远征归来后的游行。经过两个月的跋涉，他们成功抵达，与父亲及罗斯福的莽骑兵队一同参加了第五大道的庆祝游行，沿途超过百万人见证了他们的风采。

title: Michael Rabin has died
summary:
Michael Oser Rabin (1931–2026) was a pioneering Israeli mathematician and computer scientist. He was a co-recipient of the 1976 ACM Turing Award with Dana Scott for their seminal 1959 paper, "Finite Automata and Their Decision Problems," which introduced the foundational concept of nondeterministic machines.

Rabin made numerous groundbreaking contributions across computer science. He co-invented the Miller–Rabin primality test, the Rabin–Karp string search algorithm, and the Rabin cryptosystem. His work also laid the foundations for computational complexity theory, including the formalization of polynomial time, and he introduced key concepts like probabilistic automata, oblivious transfer, and infinite-tree automata.

Educated at Hebrew University and Princeton University, Rabin held professorships at Harvard University and the Hebrew University of Jerusalem. His many honors include the Israel Prize, the Harvey Prize, and the Dan David Prize. Rabin died on April 14, 2026, at the age of 94. His daughter, Tal Rabin, is also a distinguished computer scientist.
chinese_title: 迈克尔·拉宾去世了
chinese_summary:
迈克尔·奥瑟·拉宾（1931–2026）是以色列开创性的数学家与计算机科学家。他与达纳·斯科特共同获得1976年ACM图灵奖，表彰他们于1959年发表的奠基性论文《有限自动机及其判定问题》，该论文引入了非确定性机器的基础概念。

拉宾在计算机科学领域做出了多项突破性贡献。他共同发明了米勒-拉宾素数测试、拉宾-卡普字符串搜索算法以及拉宾密码系统。他的工作还为计算复杂性理论奠定了基础，包括多项式时间的正式化，并引入了概率自动机、不经意传输和无限树自动机等关键概念。

拉宾曾在希伯来大学和普林斯顿大学求学，并在哈佛大学和耶路撒冷希伯来大学担任教授。他获得的众多荣誉包括以色列奖、哈维奖和丹·大卫奖。拉宾于2026年4月14日逝世，享年94岁。他的女儿塔尔·拉宾同样是一位杰出的计算机科学家。

title: Scientists discover "cleaner ants" that groom giant ants in Arizona desert
summary:
Scientists have discovered the first known example of one ant species acting as a "cleaner" for another in the Arizona desert. Entomologist Mark Moffett observed tiny cone ants (*Dorymyrmex* sp.) grooming much larger harvester ants (*Pogonomyrmex barbatus*). The behavior closely resembles that of cleaner fish in marine ecosystems.

The process begins when a harvester ant approaches a cone ant nest and stands still with its jaws open. The smaller cone ants then climb onto the larger ant, using their mouthparts to lick and nibble its body, even venturing inside its open mandibles. The harvester ants remain passive during these sessions, which can last from seconds to several minutes, before shaking the cleaners off and leaving.

Researchers believe this is a mutually beneficial partnership. The cone ants likely gain nutrition from tiny particles, possibly seed fragments, removed from the harvester ants' bodies. The larger ants may receive a more thorough grooming, potentially removing parasites or debris from hard-to-reach areas, which could reduce infections. The discovery, published in *Ecology and Evolution*, highlights how much remains unknown about complex animal interactions in nature.
chinese_title: 科学家在亚利桑那沙漠发现“清洁蚁”，会为巨型蚂蚁梳理身体。
chinese_summary:
科学家在亚利桑那沙漠首次发现一种蚂蚁为另一种蚂蚁充当“清洁工”的现象。昆虫学家马克·莫菲特观察到微小的锥蚁正在为体型大得多的收获蚁清理身体，这种行为与海洋生态系统中清洁鱼类的行为高度相似。

整个过程始于收获蚁靠近锥蚁巢穴并静止不动地张开双颚。随后小型锥蚁会爬上大型蚂蚁的身体，用口器舔舐啃咬其体表，甚至进入其张开的颚部内侧。收获蚁在此过程中保持静止，清洁过程可持续数秒至数分钟，结束后收获蚁会抖落清洁蚁并离开。

研究人员认为这是一种互利共生的关系。锥蚁可能从收获蚁体表清除的微小颗粒（可能是种子碎屑）中获取营养，而大型蚂蚁则获得了更彻底的清洁，尤其清除了难以触及部位的寄生虫或碎屑，可能因此降低感染风险。这项发表于《生态与演化》的研究揭示，自然界中复杂的动物互动仍存在大量未知领域。

title: Opus 4.7 to 4.6 Inflation is ~45%
summary:
This article presents a community-driven tool for comparing the token costs of Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.6 and 4.7 models. The key finding is that using Opus 4.7 results in an approximate 45% increase in token cost compared to its predecessor, 4.6.

The tool, the "Anthropic Token Cost Calculator," allows users to submit prompts anonymously to see the cost difference between the two model versions. It aggregates these "Community Averages" to show how the models perform on real-world inputs.

The article clarifies that the project is open-source, stores only anonymous data, and is an independent initiative not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic. The primary takeaway is the significant cost inflation associated with the newer Opus 4.7 model, providing practical data for users considering an upgrade.
chinese_title: 作品4.7至4.6版本的通胀率约为45%
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了一款社区驱动的工具，用于比较Anthropic的Claude Opus 4.6与4.7模型的令牌成本。核心发现是：使用Opus 4.7相比其前代4.6会导致令牌成本增加约45%。

这款名为“Anthropic令牌成本计算器”的工具允许用户匿名提交提示词，以查看两个模型版本的成本差异。它通过汇总“社区平均数据”来展示模型在真实输入场景中的表现。

文章说明该项目为开源工具，仅存储匿名数据，且为独立开发项目，与Anthropic无关联或官方认可。主要结论是：新版Opus 4.7模型存在显著的成本上升，为考虑升级的用户提供了实用数据参考。

title: Sumida Aquarium Posts 2026 Penguin Relationship Chart, with Drama and Breakups
summary:
**Summary of "Sumida Aquarium Posts 2026 Penguin Relationship Chart, with Drama and Breakups"**

The Sumida Aquarium in Tokyo has released its annual "Penguin Relationship Chart" for 2026, a humorous and detailed diagram tracking the social dynamics within its colony of 52 penguins. Presented like a complex soap opera or corporate organizational chart, it maps out the various relationships, cliques, and dramas among the birds.

Key points from the chart include:
*   **Central Characters:** The colony is centered around a popular female penguin named **Iburi**, who is depicted as being at the heart of many social connections.
*   **Relationship Statuses:** The chart identifies specific pairs, such as the bonded couple **Gon and Shiro**, and notes other relationships marked as "under investigation" or having "broken up."
*   **Social Groups:** Penguins are categorized into named factions like the "Gourmet Group," the "Waterfront Property Owners," and the "Sunbathing Association," reflecting their observed habits and preferred aquarium locations.
*   **Ongoing Drama:** The chart highlights interpersonal tensions, including one penguin (**Hyoga**) who is "not on good terms" with Iburi's group, and another (**Fukumaru**) who is trying to integrate into a new clique.
*   **Purpose:** This creative project aims to educate visitors about individual penguin personalities and social behaviors, encouraging closer observation and fostering a deeper connection with the animals. It has become a popular annual tradition for the aquarium.

In essence, the aquarium uses this playful "relationship chart" to anthropomorphize its penguins, turning their daily interactions into an engaging narrative that promotes conservation and visitor interest.
chinese_title: 墨田水族馆发布2026年企鹅关系图，剧情跌宕分手频现
chinese_summary:
**《墨田水族馆发布2026年企鹅关系图，剧情涵盖恋爱与分手》摘要**

东京墨田水族馆发布了其2026年度的"企鹅关系图"，这是一幅幽默而详细的图表，追踪了馆内52只企鹅群体的社交动态。该图以复杂的肥皂剧或企业组织结构图的形式呈现，描绘了这些鸟类之间各种关系、小团体和戏剧性事件。

图表要点包括：
*   **核心角色：** 群体以一只名为**伊布里**的受欢迎雌性企鹅为中心，她被描绘成许多社交关系的核心。
*   **关系状态：** 图表标明了特定的配对，如已结为伴侣的**贡和诗织**，并注明了其他被标记为"调查中"或已"分手"的关系。
*   **社交团体：** 企鹅们被归入命名的派系，如"美食家团体"、"水滨房产所有者"和"日光浴协会"，这反映了它们被观察到的习性及偏好的水族馆区域。
*   **持续剧情：** 图表突显了企鹅间的紧张关系，包括一只与伊布里团体"关系不佳"的企鹅（**冰河**），以及另一只正试图融入新团体的企鹅（**福丸**）。
*   **目的：** 这一创意项目旨在向游客介绍每只企鹅的个性与社交行为，鼓励游客更细致地观察，并培养与动物更深的情感连接。这已成为该水族馆一项备受欢迎的年度传统。

本质上，水族馆通过这张有趣的"关系图"将其企鹅拟人化，将它们日常的互动变成一个引人入胜的故事，以此提升公众的保护意识和参观兴趣。

summary:

title: Fuzix OS
summary:
Fuzix OS 0.4 is a significant release focused on bug fixes, improved modularity (especially in networking), and unified executable formats for several processor families. The build process has been simplified with a `make diskimage` target, though careful cleaning is still required when switching configurations.

The release notes detail extensive processor support, including stable ports for 6303/6803, 6502/65C02, 6809, 68HC11, 68000, 8080, 8085, ARM, ESP8266, NS32K, and Z80/Z180 families. Several other processors (like 6800, 8086, and RISC-V) are listed as works-in-progress or used for testing.

A wide range of supported hardware systems is documented, from classic machines like the Amstrad NC100, Tandy COCO, and ZX Spectrum clones, to modern retro designs like the RC2014/RCbus family, 68K-nano, and various Small Computer Central boards. The project has also updated its naming conventions, rebranding N8VEM as Retrobrew and distinguishing between the RC2014 product line and the RCBus standard.

Overall, Fuzix 0.4 represents a consolidation and expansion of this Unix-like operating system for vintage and embedded hardware, improving stability and broadening its platform support.
chinese_title: Fuzix操作系统
chinese_summary:
Fuzix OS 0.4 是一个重要的版本，主要专注于错误修复、提升模块化（尤其在网络方面）以及为多个处理器家族统一可执行格式。构建过程已通过 `make diskimage` 目标得到简化，但在切换配置时仍需仔细清理。

title: Show HN: AI Subroutines – Run automation scripts inside your browser tab
summary:
**AI Subroutines** is a browser extension that enables users to record and replay web automation tasks directly within their browser tab, solving the key challenge of authentication in web scraping and automation.

**Core Problem & Solution:** Most web automation tools fail at scale due to high costs, latency, and non-determinism from repeated LLM use, and they struggle with complex, browser-native authentication (cookies, CSRF tokens, etc.). AI Subroutines solves this by recording network requests and user interactions *inside* the user's actual browser session. Later, it replays the captured, authenticated requests from within the same page context, inheriting all cookies and session data automatically.

**Key Mechanism:** The system intelligently filters the recorded network traffic, ranking requests to identify the relevant API calls (e.g., a "POST" sent after a click) while ignoring analytics beacons. It avoids using volatile identifiers (like GraphQL operation hashes) that would break on site updates. The result is a reliable, deterministic script called a **Subroutine**.

**Subroutines as Tools:** These Subroutines become callable functions for an AI agent. The LLM is used only once to select parameters (e.g., from a spreadsheet), and then the zero-token Subroutine executes the action for each item, making it cost-effective and reliable for bulk operations.

**Helper Library:** The tool provides an `rtrvr.*` helper namespace for writing robust scripts that handle common web interactions (finding elements, clicking, typing, making authenticated requests) without brittle selectors.

**Vision:** The goal is to build a shared library of Subroutines for common web tasks (e.g., sending LinkedIn DMs, posting on X), creating a reliable "action vocabulary" for AI agents on the web.

The extension also includes features for using personal LLM subscriptions, controlling automations via WhatsApp, and enhanced knowledge base tools.
chinese_title: Show HN: AI子程序——在浏览器标签页内运行自动化脚本
chinese_summary:
**AI子程序**是一款浏览器扩展，允许用户直接在浏览器标签页中录制并回放网页自动化任务，解决了网页抓取和自动化中的关键认证难题。

**核心问题与解决方案：** 大多数网页自动化工具因重复使用大语言模型导致的高成本、延迟和非确定性而难以扩展，且难以处理复杂的浏览器原生认证（如Cookie、CSRF令牌等）。AI子程序通过在用户的实际浏览器会话中录制网络请求和用户交互来解决这一问题。随后，它会在同一页面上下文中回放已捕获的认证请求，自动继承所有Cookie和会话数据。

**关键机制：** 该系统智能过滤录制的网络流量，对请求进行排序以识别相关API调用（例如点击后发送的“POST”请求），同时忽略分析信标。它避免使用易变的标识符（如GraphQL操作哈希），防止网站更新导致脚本失效。最终生成一个可靠且确定性的脚本，称为**子程序**。

**子程序作为工具：** 这些子程序成为AI代理可调用的函数。大语言模型仅用于一次参数选择（例如从电子表格中选取），随后零令牌消耗的子程序为每个项目执行操作，使得批量操作既经济又可靠。

**辅助库：** 该工具提供`rtrvr.*`辅助命名空间，用于编写稳健的脚本，处理常见的网页交互（查找元素、点击、输入、发起认证请求），而无需依赖脆弱的元素选择器。

**愿景：** 目标是构建一个共享子程序库，用于常见网页任务（例如发送LinkedIn私信、在X上发帖），为AI代理在网络上创建一套可靠的“行动词汇”。

该扩展还包括使用个人大语言模型订阅、通过WhatsApp控制自动化以及增强知识库工具等功能。

title: Show HN: Remoroo. trying to fix memory in long-running coding agents
summary:
**Remoroo** is an autonomous research engine designed to automate and improve long-running code experiments, particularly for machine learning and deep tech teams. Unlike typical coding agents that make quick, one-off fixes, Remoroo runs extended, sandboxed research sessions (e.g., overnight) on local code.

**Core Functionality:** Users write a specification (like `program.md`), and Remoroo autonomously conducts multiple experiments (editing code, training, evaluating) within a set time budget. It uses a fixed evaluation harness to test changes, automatically keeping improvements and discarding failures. The tool provides verified, reproducible results with clear metrics (e.g., validation loss improvement) and structured proof of progress.

**Key Benefits:** It addresses the inefficiency of manual experimentation—where hours can yield no progress—by automating the trial-and-error process. Remoroo outputs not just code suggestions but verified patches with artifact replay and Git integration.

**Differentiation:** The tool contrasts itself with standard "coding agents" by operating on a longer time scale (hours vs. seconds), conducting multi-experiment searches, autonomously keeping/discarding based on metrics, and ensuring reproducibility.

**Usage:** It’s installed via pip, includes a free tier with monthly credits (billed based on compute time in "Haiku-hour" units), and runs locally.
chinese_title: Show HN：Remoroo，尝试修复长期运行编码代理中的记忆问题
chinese_summary:
**Remoroo**是一款自主研究引擎，旨在自动化并优化长期运行的代码实验，尤其适用于机器学习和深度技术团队。与通常进行快速一次性修复的编码助手不同，Remoroo能在本地代码上运行长时间、沙盒化的研究会话（例如通宵执行）。

**核心功能：** 用户编写规范（如`program.md`），Remoroo即可在设定的时间预算内自主进行多项实验（编辑代码、训练、评估）。它使用固定的评估框架测试修改，自动保留有效改进并丢弃失败尝试。该工具提供经过验证、可复现的结果，包含清晰指标（如验证损失改进）和结构化的进展证明。

**关键优势：** 通过自动化试错过程，它解决了手动实验效率低下的问题——传统方式可能耗费数小时却毫无进展。Remoroo不仅输出代码建议，更提供带有成果复现和Git集成的已验证补丁。

**差异化特点：** 该工具与标准“编码助手”的区别在于：操作时间跨度更长（小时级而非秒级）、执行多实验搜索、基于指标自主保留/丢弃修改，并确保结果可复现。

**使用方式：** 可通过pip安装，包含提供月度免费额度的基础版（按“Haiku-小时”计算单位计费），并在本地运行。

title: 80386 Memory Pipeline
summary:
This article examines the memory pipeline of the 80386 processor, explaining how it achieves high performance despite the complexity of its virtual memory system. The key insight is that the 386 uses a carefully overlapped pipeline, parallelism, and caching to make the common-case address path take only about 1.5 clock cycles.

The microcode for memory operations shows a pattern of issuing a read/write command followed by a delay (DLY), expecting the memory system to respond quickly. To meet this demand, the 386 employs several optimizations. Segmentation, a mandatory feature, is made efficient by caching descriptor information (base, limit, attributes) in hidden registers when a segment is loaded, avoiding table lookups on every access. The linear address calculation and limit check are performed in parallel.

A major performance feature is "Early Start," where the address generation for the next instruction begins in the final cycle of the current instruction, hiding latency. However, this complex optimization introduced bugs like the POPAD bug. For paging, a Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB) provides a fast path; on a miss, a dedicated hardware page walker handles the table lookup without involving microcode.

Finally, the bus interface uses a non-multiplexed address/data bus and supports address pipelining to maximize bandwidth, while bus arbitration prioritizes data accesses over instruction prefetch to hide contention.
chinese_title: 80386内存流水线
chinese_summary:
本文探讨了80386处理器的内存流水线，解释其如何在虚拟内存系统复杂的情况下实现高性能。关键发现在于，386通过精心设计的重叠流水线、并行处理与缓存机制，使得常见地址路径仅需约1.5个时钟周期。

内存操作的微代码显示出一种模式：先发出读/写命令，随后插入延迟（DLY），预期内存系统快速响应。为满足这一需求，386采用了多项优化。分段作为强制功能，通过在加载段时将描述符信息（基址、界限、属性）缓存至隐藏寄存器实现高效运行，避免了每次访问时的表查找。线性地址计算与界限检查并行执行。

“提前启动”是重要的性能特性：下一指令的地址生成在当前指令的最后一个周期开始，从而隐藏延迟。但这一复杂优化也引入了如POPAD漏洞等错误。对于分页机制，转译后备缓冲器（TLB）提供快速路径；若未命中，专用硬件页表遍历器会处理表查找而无需微代码介入。

最后，总线接口采用非复用的地址/数据总线，并支持地址流水线以最大化带宽，同时总线仲裁优先处理数据访问而非指令预取，以隐藏竞争冲突。

title: Amiga Graphics Archive
summary:
This article introduces an archive dedicated to the graphics of the Commodore Amiga computer. It highlights that the Amiga, launched in 1985, was groundbreaking for its era due to its superior graphics capabilities. This power was made possible by a sophisticated set of custom chips, which allowed the computer to achieve visual effects previously impossible on other personal computers of the time.

In essence, it is a preservation hub celebrating the unique and influential visual legacy of this iconic home computer system.
chinese_title: Amiga图形档案库
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了一个专门致力于Commodore Amiga计算机图形作品的档案库。文章指出，Amiga于1985年推出，凭借其卓越的图形处理能力成为当时具有开创性的产品。这一强大性能得益于一套精密的定制芯片组，使得该计算机能够实现同时期其他个人电脑无法企及的视觉效果。

该网站的核心宗旨是作为精选合集与致敬平台，收录既包括*利用*Amiga（通过其内置工具与软件）创作的作品，也涵盖*为*Amiga（例如游戏和演示场景图形）创作的艺术成果。本质上，这是一个保存并颂扬这款标志性家用计算机系统独特而富有影响力的视觉遗产的核心平台。

title: Understanding the FFT Algorithm (2013)
summary:
This article explains the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) algorithm, focusing on the Cooley-Tukey method. It begins by contrasting the naive Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT), which has a computational complexity of O(N²), with the FFT's much faster O(N log N) performance.

The core insight is exploiting symmetry in the DFT. The author demonstrates that the DFT can be recursively split into smaller transforms on even- and odd-indexed elements. This divide-and-conquer strategy drastically reduces the number of calculations.

The post walks through three Python implementations:
1.  A slow, direct DFT using matrix multiplication.
2.  A recursive FFT that applies the Cooley-Tukey method, falling back to the slow DFT for small arrays.
3.  A vectorized, non-recursive FFT that improves performance by batching operations using NumPy.

Each implementation is benchmarked against NumPy's highly optimized FFTPACK library, showing significant speed improvements with each step, though the custom Python code remains slower than the professional Fortran library. The author concludes that understanding the underlying algorithm, even via simplified implementations, provides valuable intuition for data scientists who regularly use FFTs as a black-box tool.
chinese_title: 理解FFT算法（2013）
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了快速傅里叶变换（FFT）算法，重点探讨了库利-图基方法。文章首先对比了计算复杂度为O(N²)的朴素离散傅里叶变换（DFT）与FFT更快的O(N log N)性能。

其核心在于利用DFT的对称性。作者展示了DFT可以递归地拆分为对偶数和奇数索引元素的更小变换。这种分治策略大幅减少了计算量。

文章逐步解析了三种Python实现：
1. 使用矩阵乘法的缓慢直接DFT。
2. 应用库利-图基方法的递归FFT，对小数组回退到缓慢DFT。
3. 通过NumPy批量操作的向量化非递归FFT，提升了性能。

每种实现都与NumPy高度优化的FFTPACK库进行了基准测试，显示每一步都带来显著的速度提升，尽管自定义Python代码仍比专业的Fortran库慢。作者总结道，即使通过简化实现来理解底层算法，也能为经常将FFT作为黑盒工具的数据科学家提供宝贵的直观认识。

title: Category Theory Illustrated – Orders
summary:
This article introduces the concept of orders in mathematics, distinguishing between linear (total) orders and partial orders. A linear order is defined by a binary relation (≤) on a set that is reflexive, transitive, antisymmetric, and total, meaning every pair of elements is comparable (e.g., natural numbers ordered by size). Partial orders relax the totality requirement, meaning not all elements need to be comparable (e.g., ordering people by skill if they have never competed).

Key structures within partial orders are explained:
*   **Chains:** Linearly ordered subsets within a partial order.
*   **Greatest/Least Elements:** Elements that are greater than or equal to (or less than or equal to) all others.
*   **Joins and Meets:** The join is the least upper bound of two elements, while the meet is their greatest lower bound. These correspond to meaningful operations in specific contexts (e.g., color mixing or finding the least common multiple).

The article illustrates these concepts with examples like Hasse diagrams, a color-mixing partial order, the partial order of numbers by divisibility, and the inclusion order of sets. It highlights that the join and meet in these examples correspond to union/intersection for sets and LCM/GCD for numbers. Finally, it notes Birkhoff's representation theorem, which shows that many partial orders can be represented as inclusion orders of sets.
chinese_title: 范畴论图解——序关系
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了数学中序的概念，区分了线性（全）序与偏序。线性序由集合上的二元关系（≤）定义，该关系具有自反性、传递性、反对称性和完全性，即任意两个元素均可比较（例如按大小排序的自然数）。偏序则放宽了完全性要求，意味着并非所有元素都必须可比（例如按技能排序从未同台竞技的人）。

文中解释了偏序中的关键结构：
*   **链：** 偏序中的线性有序子集。
*   **最大/最小元：** 大于等于（或小于等于）所有其他元素的元素。
*   **并和交：** 并是两个元素的最小上界，交是它们的最大下界。这些在特定情境中对应有意义的操作（例如颜色混合或求最小公倍数）。

文章通过哈斯图、颜色混合偏序、按整除性排序的数的偏序以及集合的包含序等示例阐释了这些概念。文中强调，这些例子中的并和交分别对应集合的并集/交集以及数的最小公倍数/最大公约数。最后，文章提及伯克霍夫表示定理，该定理表明许多偏序可以表示为集合的包含序。

title: College instructor turns to typewriters to curb AI-written work
summary:
In response to students using AI and online translators, Cornell University German instructor Grit Matthias Phelps has introduced a unique "analog" assignment. Once a semester, students in her classes use manual typewriters to complete writing tasks, disconnecting from all digital aids like screens, spellcheck, and delete keys.

The exercise, which began in 2023, forces students to slow down and engage differently with the material. Phelps aims to recreate a pre-digital classroom experience, emphasizing focused, single-task work. Students must learn to operate the non-intuitive machines, manually feed paper, and correct errors with pencil marks.

Students reported significant benefits from the analog process. Without digital distractions, they engaged more with classmates for help and thought more intentionally about their writing before committing words to paper. The physical act of typing, including the weaker pinky fingers required for manual keys, made the process more deliberate.

While not a widespread comeback, the typewriter assignment is part of a broader trend of educators using low-tech methods to ensure authentic student work in the age of AI. The experience taught students about historical writing tools and highlighted how modern technology alters classroom interaction and the writing process itself.
chinese_title: 大学教师采用打字机遏制AI代写作业现象。
chinese_summary:
针对学生使用人工智能和在线翻译工具的现象，康奈尔大学德语教师格里特·马蒂亚斯·菲尔普斯设计了一项独特的“模拟”作业。每学期一次，她课堂上的学生需使用手动打字机完成写作任务，彻底脱离屏幕、拼写检查和删除键等数字辅助工具。

这项始于2023年的练习迫使学生放慢节奏，以不同方式投入学习。菲尔普斯旨在重现数字时代前的课堂体验，强调专注的单任务工作模式。学生必须学会操作这些非直觉式的机器，手动装纸，并用铅笔痕迹修正错误。

学生们反馈这种模拟过程带来了显著益处。在没有数字干扰的情况下，他们更频繁地与同学交流互助，落笔前更审慎地构思内容。包括需要用小指按压机械键在内的实体打字过程，使写作变得更为深思熟虑。

尽管尚未形成广泛回归，这项打字机作业正呼应着教育界的更广泛趋势——在人工智能时代，教师正通过低科技手段确保学生作业的真实性。该体验不仅让学生了解历史书写工具，更凸显了现代技术如何改变课堂互动与写作过程本身。

title: It's OK to compare floating-points for equality
summary:
This article challenges the common advice to always use epsilon comparisons for floating-point equality, arguing that such comparisons are often a flawed solution. The author contends that floating-point numbers are deterministic and predictable, not random, and that epsilon comparisons are problematic because they are arbitrary, non-transitive, and can lead to hard-to-debug inconsistencies across codebases.

Instead, the article advocates for rethinking the underlying problem. It provides examples like grid-based movement in games and spherical linear interpolation (slerp) to illustrate better approaches. For movement, the solution is to decouple game logic from visual interpolation, allowing user input without waiting for exact positional equality. For slerp, the issue of NaN results is best resolved by checking for exact equality (dot product >= 1) and falling back to linear interpolation, rather than using an arbitrary epsilon.

The core message is that developers should analyze why a comparison is needed and seek robust, domain-specific solutions—often involving exact equality or architectural changes—rather than defaulting to error-prone epsilon hacks.
chinese_title: 比较浮点数是否相等是可以的。
chinese_summary:
本文对“始终使用epsilon比较来判断浮点数相等性”这一常见建议提出质疑，认为这种比较方式往往是一种有缺陷的解决方案。作者指出，浮点数是确定且可预测的，而非随机的；epsilon比较的问题在于其具有任意性、不满足传递性，并可能导致跨代码库中难以调试的不一致问题。

文章主张重新思考问题本质，并以游戏中的网格移动和球面线性插值（slerp）为例说明更优解法。对于移动问题，解决方案是将游戏逻辑与视觉插值分离，允许用户输入而不必等待精确的位置相等性。对于slerp，处理NaN结果的最佳方式是通过检查精确相等性（点积≥1）并回退到线性插值，而非采用任意的epsilon值。

文章核心观点是：开发者应当分析比较需求背后的原因，寻找稳健且针对特定领域的解决方案——通常涉及精确相等性判断或架构调整——而非默认采用容易出错的epsilon技巧。

title: Show HN: I made a calculator that works over disjoint sets of intervals
summary:
This article introduces an online calculator that performs arithmetic operations on disjoint sets of intervals, known as interval union arithmetic. Unlike standard calculators, it operates on unions like `[a, b] U [c, d]`, which can represent uncertainty or complex number sets. A key feature is the inclusion property, guaranteeing that any real number calculation from the input intervals will fall within the output union.

The tool supports basic operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, exponentiation) and functions (logarithms, trigonometry, min/max). It can handle division by intervals containing zero, producing results like `1 / [-2, 1] → [-∞, -0.5] U [1, +∞]`. Users can input bare numbers (treated as narrow intervals) or intervals using bracket syntax.

A "full precision mode" uses outward rounding with IEEE 754 doubles to ensure results contain the true mathematical value, addressing floating-point precision issues (e.g., `0.1 + 0.2` yields an interval containing 0.3). The calculator is open-source, with plans for future enhancements like an `ans` variable and intersection operations.
chinese_title: Show HN：我制作了一个能在不相交区间集合上运行的计算器
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了一款在线计算器，它能够对不相交的区间集合执行算术运算，即区间并集运算。与标准计算器不同，它可处理如`[a, b] U [c, d]`的并集形式，这类表达式可用于表示不确定性或复杂数集。其核心特性是包含性保证：输入区间内任意实数计算的结果必定落在输出并集范围内。

该工具支持基础运算（加、减、乘、除、乘方）和函数运算（对数、三角函数、最小/最大值）。它能处理除数为含零区间的情况，例如生成`1 / [-2, 1] → [-∞, -0.5] U [1, +∞]`的结果。用户可输入纯数字（视为窄区间）或使用括号语法的区间。

“全精度模式”采用IEEE 754双精度浮点数的外舍入法，确保结果包含真实数学值，从而解决浮点数精度问题（例如`0.1 + 0.2`会生成包含0.3的区间）。该计算器为开源项目，未来计划增加如`ans`变量和交集运算等功能扩展。

title: 4-bit floating point FP4
summary:
This article discusses the shift from high-precision to low-precision floating-point formats, driven by the needs of neural networks. It focuses on 4-bit floating point (FP4), which sacrifices precision to fit more parameters into memory.

The core of the article explains the FP4 format, specifically the common E2M1 variant (2 exponent bits, 1 mantissa bit). It details how a 4-bit number is structured: 1 sign bit, 2 exponent bits, and 1 mantissa bit. The value is calculated as (−1)^s * 2^(e−b) * (1 + m/2), where *b* is a bias. An exception exists for the exponent value 0, which represents subnormal numbers like 0 and 0.5.

A complete table lists all 16 possible values for the E2M1 format, showing its uneven spacing and the presence of both +0 and -0. The article notes that while E3M0, E1M2, and E0M3 formats also exist, E2M1 is the most common and is hardware-supported.

Finally, it introduces the Pychop Python library for emulating such formats and mentions that FP4 is just one of many 4-bit formats, hinting at a follow-up discussion on others like NF4.
chinese_title: 4位浮点数FP4
chinese_summary:
本文探讨了受神经网络需求驱动，从高精度浮点格式向低精度格式的转变，重点分析了4位浮点数（FP4）——这种格式通过牺牲精度来在内存中容纳更多参数。

文章的核心解释了FP4格式，特别是常见的E2M1变体（2位指数，1位尾数）。详细说明了4位数的结构：1位符号位、2位指数位和1位尾数位。数值计算公式为(−1)^s * 2^(e−b) * (1 + m/2)，其中*b*为偏置值。当指数值为0时存在例外，表示次正规数，如0和0.5。

完整的表格列出了E2M1格式所有16种可能取值，展示了其不均匀分布特性以及同时存在+0和-0的情况。文章指出，虽然E3M0、E1M2和E0M3等格式也存在，但E2M1最为常见且已获得硬件支持。

最后，文章介绍了用于模拟此类格式的Python库Pychop，并提到FP4仅是众多4位格式中的一种，暗示后续将讨论其他格式如NF4。

title: Why Japan has such good railways
summary:
Japan's exceptional railway system, which carries a higher share of passengers than any other developed nation, is not primarily due to cultural preferences but to effective public policy. Its success stems from a unique business model and supportive urban planning.

The network is dominated by private companies, many of which have always been private. These firms operate on a "railway-as-city-builder" model, developing real estate, retail, and entertainment around their stations. This allows them to capture the value their rail lines create, making the overall enterprise profitable and creating a virtuous cycle that reinforces ridership.

This model is enabled by Japan's liberal land-use regulations and "land readjustment" processes, which make it easy to build dense, mixed-use developments around transit hubs. While Japanese residential suburbs are not exceptionally dense, the policy facilitates hyper-dense city centers perfectly suited for rail's spatial efficiency.

Furthermore, Japan does not heavily subsidize car use. Driving is priced more realistically through taxes and tolls, and strict licensing and parking regulations make car ownership less convenient in cities. This creates a level playing field where the superior efficiency of rail in dense urban corridors can win out.

In summary, Japan's railway excellence results from a synergistic combination of privatized, diversified railway corporations, transit-oriented urban development policies, and a regulatory environment that does not artificially favor automobiles.
chinese_title: 日本为何拥有如此出色的铁路系统
chinese_summary:
日本卓越的铁路系统——其客运分担率高于任何其他发达国家——主要并非源于文化偏好，而是得益于有效的公共政策。其成功源于独特的商业模式与支持性的城市规划。

该铁路网主要由私营公司主导，其中许多自始便是私营性质。这些企业采用“以铁路建设城市”的模式，在车站周边开发房地产、零售和娱乐设施。这使得它们能够获取铁路线路所创造的价值，实现整体盈利，并形成提升客运量的良性循环。

日本宽松的土地使用法规和“土地重整”流程为这一模式提供了条件，使得在交通枢纽周围建设高密度、多功能综合开发项目变得容易。尽管日本住宅郊区密度并不特别高，但政策促成了超高密度的市中心建设，完美契合了铁路的空间效率优势。

此外，日本并未对汽车使用提供大量补贴。通过税收和通行费，驾车成本更贴近实际；严格的驾照和停车规定也使城市中拥有汽车变得不那么便利。这创造了一个公平的竞争环境，使铁路在高密度城市走廊中的高效优势得以充分发挥。

总之，日本的铁路卓越成就源于私有化多元化铁路企业、公交导向型城市发展政策以及不人为偏向汽车的监管环境，这三者形成了协同效应。

title: The USDA's gardening zones have shifted. (Interactive app and map) (2024)
summary:
The USDA's 2023 plant hardiness zone map, updated for the first time in 11 years, shows that about half of the country has shifted to a warmer half-zone due to climate change and improved data collection. This map, which indicates the average coldest winter temperature over 30 years, is a key tool for gardeners to select perennial plants like trees and shrubs that can survive local winters.

However, the article emphasizes that the zone rating is just one factor. It does not account for extreme cold snaps, the duration of cold, summer heat, rainfall, or microclimates in a garden. For example, three different cities in Zone 7a—Juneau, Boston, and Santa Fe—have vastly different climates.

Experts advise gardeners to use the map cautiously, as a warmer zone doesn't guarantee new plants will thrive. They recommend consulting local nurseries and extension services for tailored advice and note that many gardeners have already been experimenting with hardier plant varieties as winters have warmed. The updated map reflects changes that have already occurred, not future predictions.
chinese_title: 美国农业部种植区划已发生变化。（互动应用与地图）（2024年）
chinese_summary:
美国农业部2023年植物耐寒区地图在时隔11年后首次更新，显示由于气候变化和数据收集方法的改进，全国约半数地区已向更温暖的半区迁移。该地图基于30年间冬季平均最低气温绘制，是园丁选择树木、灌木等多年生植物的重要参考工具，帮助判断植物能否在当地越冬。

但文章强调，耐寒区评级仅是参考因素之一。它无法反映极端寒潮、低温持续时间、夏季高温、降雨量或庭院小气候的影响。例如同属7a区的朱诺、波士顿和圣达菲三座城市，实际气候条件差异显著。

专家建议园丁谨慎使用该地图，因为更温暖的区域并不保证新植物能茁壮成长。他们推荐咨询当地苗圃和农业推广服务机构获取针对性建议，并指出随着冬季变暖，许多园丁早已开始试种更耐寒的植物品种。此次更新的地图反映的是已经发生的变化，而非对未来气候的预测。

title: The quiet disappearance of the free-range childhood
summary:
This article examines the cultural and legal shift away from "free-range" childhoods, where children once played independently. It centers on a Georgia family investigated for neglect after their 6-year-old son rode his scooter alone to a nearby park, prompted by a stranger's report.

The case highlights a national trend where vague child-neglect laws and heightened safety fears—particularly about stranger abduction—have expanded government oversight into ordinary parenting decisions. Despite statistics showing stranger kidnappings are extremely rare (about 100 cases annually), cultural anxiety has led many parents to restrict their children's independence.

In response, a "reasonable childhood independence" (RCI) movement has successfully passed laws in 11 states, including Georgia. These laws aim to clarify that allowing capable children age-appropriate freedom does not constitute neglect, protecting parents from unwarranted state intervention. However, the article notes that child welfare systems often lack effective triage to filter out non-serious reports.

Ultimately, the piece argues that while perceived risks drive supervision, overprotection carries its own consequences. Advocates contend that granting measured independence is essential for developing children's resilience, responsibility, and long-term capability, balancing safety with the need to prepare them for adulthood.
chinese_title: 自由放养童年的悄然消逝
chinese_summary:
本文探讨了文化及法律层面逐渐远离“自由放养”式童年的现象——过去孩子们常能独立玩耍。文章聚焦于佐治亚州一个家庭：因陌生人举报，他们6岁的儿子独自骑滑板车去附近公园后，该家庭被以疏忽罪调查。

此案反映了一个全国性趋势：模糊的儿童疏忽法律与加剧的安全担忧——特别是对陌生人诱拐的恐惧——已使政府监管延伸至日常育儿决策。尽管统计数据显示陌生人绑架案极为罕见（每年约100起），文化焦虑仍促使许多父母限制孩子的独立性。

对此，“合理童年独立”运动已在包括佐治亚州在内的11个州成功推动立法。这些法律旨在明确：允许有能力的孩子进行适龄自由活动不构成疏忽，从而保护父母免受不必要的国家干预。但文章指出，儿童福利体系往往缺乏有效筛查机制来过滤非严重举报。

文章最终提出，虽然感知风险推动了监管，但过度保护亦会带来后果。倡导者认为，给予适度的独立性对培养孩子的韧性、责任感及长期能力至关重要，这是在安全防护与为他们成年做准备之间寻求平衡。

title: Towards trust in Emacs
summary:
This article discusses the security improvements in Emacs 30, which introduced a trust system to prevent arbitrary code execution by treating all files as untrusted by default. While a safer default, this system creates user friction by disabling features like the Emacs Lisp Flymake backend for diagnostics in untrusted files, leading many users to disable the security measure entirely.

To address this, the author introduces **trust-manager**, a new package that reduces friction by enabling just-in-time trust management. When enabled, it prompts users to trust a project upon first access and remembers the choice. It also automatically trusts key user files (like init files) and directories. The package adds a mode-line indicator (a red "?") for untrusted buffers, allowing users to click and grant trust instantly.

Trust settings are stored in `trust-manager-trust-alist` and can be managed via dedicated commands or a customization interface. The package also integrates with project management to clear stale trust entries. Overall, trust-manager aims to make Emacs' security system more user-friendly by minimizing interruptions while maintaining protection. It is available on MELPA and GitHub.
chinese_title: 迈向对Emacs的信任
chinese_summary:
本文探讨了Emacs 30中的安全改进，该系统引入了信任机制，默认将所有文件视为不可信以防止任意代码执行。虽然这一默认设置更安全，但也带来了用户操作上的不便——例如在不可信文件中禁用Emacs Lisp Flymake后端诊断功能，导致许多用户完全关闭了该安全措施。

为此，作者推出了**trust-manager**新插件，通过即时信任管理来减少操作摩擦。启用后，该插件会在首次访问项目时提示用户是否信任，并记住选择。同时自动信任关键用户文件（如初始化文件）和目录。插件还会在不可信缓冲区添加模式行指示器（红色"?"标识），用户点击即可快速授予信任。

信任设置存储在`trust-manager-trust-alist`中，可通过专用命令或定制界面管理。该插件还与项目管理集成，可清理过期的信任条目。总体而言，trust-manager旨在通过最小化干扰同时保持防护，使Emacs安全系统更友好易用。该插件已在MELPA和GitHub上发布。

title: Rail: A self-hosting language that speaks TLS alone
summary:
Rail is a self-hosting systems programming language that compiles itself into a 729 KB ARM64 binary with zero C dependencies. Its runtime, including the garbage collector, is written in ARM64 assembly. Version 3.0.0 introduces a pure-Rail TLS 1.3 client and HTTPS stack, enabling secure communication with services like Anthropic's API without relying on OpenSSL or curl. The language supports multiple backends: macOS ARM64, Linux ARM64, Linux x86_64, and WASM.

Key features include algebraic data types, pattern matching, higher-order functions, unboxed floating-point operations, and effect handlers. The compiler serves as the central tool for testing, self-compilation (achieving byte-identical output), and even as a fitness function for AI training loops that generate valid Rail code.

The TLS implementation includes essential cryptographic primitives (ChaCha20-Poly1305, x25519, SHA-2, ECDSA, RSA) and validates X.509 certificate chains against the system trust store. However, it has intentional limitations: it supports only one cipher suite, lacks performance optimizations like session resumption, and is not designed for constant-time operations.

Rail is licensed under the Business Source License 1.1, which is free for non-production use and converts to Apache 2.0 in 2030.
chinese_title: Rail：一种仅使用TLS的自托管语言
chinese_summary:
Rail是一种自托管的系统编程语言，能够将自身编译为729KB的ARM64二进制文件，且完全不依赖C语言。其运行时（包括垃圾回收器）均用ARM64汇编编写。3.0.0版本引入了纯Rail实现的TLS 1.3客户端与HTTPS协议栈，使得无需依赖OpenSSL或curl即可与Anthropic API等服务进行安全通信。该语言支持多种后端平台：macOS ARM64、Linux ARM64、Linux x86_64以及WASM。

核心特性包括代数数据类型、模式匹配、高阶函数、未装箱浮点运算和效应处理机制。编译器不仅是核心开发工具，还用于测试、自编译（可生成字节级完全一致的输出），甚至可作为AI训练循环的适应度函数，用于生成有效的Rail代码。

TLS实现包含必要的加密原语（ChaCha20-Poly1305、x25519、SHA-2、ECDSA、RSA），并能根据系统信任库验证X.509证书链。但该实现存在明确限制：仅支持一种密码套件，缺乏会话恢复等性能优化，且未设计为恒定时间操作。

Rail采用Business Source License 1.1许可证，允许非生产环境免费使用，并将在2030年自动转换为Apache 2.0许可证。

title: A Dumb Introduction to Z3 (2025)
summary:
This article introduces the Z3 theorem prover through simple examples in Rust, aimed at beginners with no prior knowledge of constraint solvers. It explains that Z3 is a tool for solving problems defined by rules and constraints, useful in scenarios like scheduling and resource allocation.

The author starts with basic algebraic equations, demonstrating how to declare variables and assert constraints using Z3's Rust bindings. They highlight key terminology: "sorts" refer to types, and "constants" are the variables Z3 manipulates. The examples progress from single-variable equations to systems with multiple variables, showing how to handle integer and real types, extract solutions, and find multiple results.

The article then tackles the coin change problem, an optimization task where the goal is to minimize the number of coins for a given total. It introduces Z3's `Optimize` object and emphasizes the need to add non-negativity constraints to avoid invalid solutions. The `push` and `pop` methods are shown as ways to efficiently test multiple scenarios without rebuilding the solver.

Finally, the author outlines the initial steps for solving a Sudoku puzzle, setting up a 9x9 grid of integer variables and applying constraints for rows, columns, and cell values. The article concludes by noting that the full Sudoku solver code is omitted for brevity but the approach is clearly laid out.
chinese_title: Z3入门傻瓜教程（2025）
chinese_summary:
本文通过Rust中的简单示例向无约束求解器基础的初学者介绍Z3定理证明器。文章解释Z3是一种用于解决由规则和约束定义问题的工具，适用于调度和资源分配等场景。

作者从基础代数方程入手，演示如何通过Z3的Rust绑定声明变量和设置约束。重点术语包括："sorts"指类型，"constants"是Z3操作的变量。示例从单变量方程逐步扩展到多变量方程组，展示如何处理整数与实数类型、提取解并寻找多组结果。

随后文章探讨硬币找零问题——这是一个以最小硬币数量达成目标总额的优化任务。通过引入Z3的`Optimize`对象，强调需添加非负约束以避免无效解。文中演示的`push`和`pop`方法可在不重建求解器的情况下高效测试多组场景。

最后作者概述解决数独谜题的初步步骤：建立9x9整数变量网格，并对行、列及单元格数值设置约束。文章结尾说明，为保持简洁虽未提供完整数独求解代码，但已清晰呈现实现思路。

title: The simple geometry behind any road
summary:
This article explains a geometric method for procedurally generating smooth roads using only lines and circular arcs, avoiding complex splines. The core idea is to represent a road as a series of "profiles" (cross-sections), similar to control points in a Bezier curve.

The fundamental problem is connecting two profiles with defined positions and orientations. A single circular arc cannot always satisfy the tangent constraints at both ends. The solution is a "two-line fillet" construction: extend lines from each profile endpoint along their tangents until they intersect. By creating a perpendicular from a midpoint on the longer line, you find a circle center, resulting in a path composed of a straight segment followed by a circular arc (or vice-versa).

For more complex cases where the tangent lines don't intersect (like an S-curve shift), the author introduces an intermediary profile. Its position and orientation are approximated using a cubic Hermite spline evaluated at its midpoint, splitting the problem into two simpler fillet constructions.

The article acknowledges special cases (like parallel tangents) and design constraints to avoid unsolvable geometries, concluding that this line-and-arc building block enables creating arbitrary road shapes, setting the stage for handling intersections in future work.
chinese_title: 任何道路背后的简单几何原理
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了一种仅使用直线和圆弧程序化生成平滑道路的几何方法，避免了复杂的样条曲线。其核心思想是将道路表示为一系列“剖面”（横截面），类似于贝塞尔曲线中的控制点。

基本问题在于连接两个具有确定位置和方向的剖面。单个圆弧无法始终满足两端的切线约束。解决方案是采用“双线圆角”构造：从每个剖面端点沿切线方向延伸直线直至相交。通过在较长线段的中点作垂线，可以确定圆心，从而形成由直线段接续圆弧（或反之）构成的路径。

对于更复杂的情况（如切线不相交的S形弯道变换），作者引入了中间剖面。其位置和方向通过三次埃尔米特样条在中间点求值来近似，从而将问题拆分为两个更简单的圆角构造。

文章讨论了特殊情况（如平行切线）和避免无解几何形状的设计约束，并总结道：这种直线与圆弧的基础构建单元能够创建任意道路形状，为未来处理交叉路口问题奠定了基础。
